calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-03-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-30-2019 Continued To Jun-19-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-07-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Dorian A. Aleman, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

Derek J. Onysko, Esq. appeared for plaintiff David M. Schmitt, a California Sole Proprietorship.
Plaintiff David M. Schmitt was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Dorian A. Aleman, an individual.
Plaintiff's complaint for Intentional Misrepresentation and Fraudulent Concealment was filed on February 9, 2018.
Order for Publication of Summons & Complaint was filed on October 12, 2018.
Proof of Publication of Summons & Complaint in World Journal was filed on November 15, 2018.
Default as to defendant Dorian A. Aleman, an individual, was entered on December 19, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on April 14, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff David M. Schmitt, a California Sole Proprietorship, and against the Defaulted Defendant Dorian A. Aleman, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $3,444.60.
Prejudgment Interest - $561.03.
Costs - $2,711.56.

Total - $6,717.19.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment Prove Up Hearing
